job_summary: A Sponsor-Dedicated CRA works exclusively for one sponsor (pharma/biotech company) while being employed by a CRO or directly by the sponsor.
key_responsibilities: Monitor trials for a single sponsor
Ensure consistency across all assigned studies
Develop deep understanding of sponsor protocols
Build long-term relationships with sites and stakeholders
career_path: Sponsor CRA → Senior CRA → Clinical Trial Lead
skills_required: build long-term relationships with sites and stakeholders
develop deep understanding of sponsor protocols
ensure consistency across all assigned studies
monitor trials for a single sponsor
